---
title: "Ben (Emilio) Ojemann"
image: IMG_6773.JPG
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/beojemann
---

Hi! My name is Ben "Emilio" Ojemann, I am a doubel major in **Hydrologic Sciences & Policy** and **Physical Geography** at UC Santa Barbara.

I grew up in Seattle, WA where the Pacific Northwest instilled in me a deep love for the great outdoors and the environment.
